resources.string: Registration is not available at this time. For access, contact on Discord: zeddis.xyz
Uses the same account as ZeddiHub Desktop.
This account is disabled. Contact an admin.
Too many attempts. Try again shortly.
Already have an account? Sign in
That username or e-mail is already taken.
Too many attempts from this network. Try later.
That username or e-mail is already taken.
This account is disabled. Contact an admin.
Too fast. Try again in a moment.
Too many failed attempts. Try later.
Sign-in expired. Please sign in again.
Session expired. Please sign in again.
Confirm your identity with fingerprint or face
Location permission is required to show Wi-Fi details (SSID, BSSID).
Get geolocation data for any IP or domain
Free up space by clearing app cache and temporary files.
Wipes internal cache, external cache and the temp folder.
Evicts OkHttp\'s active connections and cached DNS. System DNS can\'t be flushed without root.
Manage storage and app permissions in Android system settings.
Pick a folder (e.g. the storage root). The app will find .tmp, .log, .bak files, empty stale files and thumbnail caches and offer to delete them.
Opens Android\'s built-in storage manager — per-app usage breakdown plus system-level cache clean options.
Help us keep the servers online
Check for new versions on startup
Clears all data and logs you out
This will delete all local data, saved credentials and preferences. This action is irreversible.
Share WiFi via QR code and manage saved networks.
Android hides saved passwords. Open system settings to share via the built-in QR code.
Android 10+ hides this list from apps. Available only on older versions.
Scan the code with another device to connect.
Scanning nearby networks requires location permission.
Dots near the center have stronger signal. Tap a network below to highlight it.
No networks yet. Waiting for scan result…
Scan a document and save it as PDF via Google ML Kit.
Ambient noise via the microphone. For reference only.
Offset %1$.1f dB (adjust against a reference meter)
Confirm your identity with biometrics to continue.
No biometrics are enrolled on this device. Add one in system settings or disable the lock in app Settings.
Enter 4–12 digits to unlock the app.
Forgot PIN? Factory-reset the app in Settings.
Alternative to biometrics. If your device has no fingerprint or face unlock, use a PIN instead.
PIN must be at least 4 digits.
PIN may have at most 12 digits.
QR codes, strong password generator and your saved WiFi.
Scan with your camera to connect.
Point your camera at a WiFi QR code and the app will extract SSID and password.
The QR code is not in WIFI format (missing SSID).
Nothing saved yet — fill the form above and press "Save".
Android 10+ no longer exposes stored passwords. They can only be viewed from system settings.
Public WiFi around you. Share yours to help others.
No spots nearby. Be the first!
Save SSID, password and venue. GPS coordinates fill in automatically.
WiFi Map needs precise location to show nearby networks and let you submit your own.
An older or duplicate copy of ZeddiHub is installed on this device. Uninstall it to avoid conflicts and out-of-sync data. ZeddiHub must only be installed once.
Warning: high frequencies or volume can damage hearing and speakers.
A low-frequency sweep to push water or dust out of the speaker. Hold the phone speaker-down.
URL from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X, Reddit…
Ready. Paste a link and tap Get link.
Using cobalt.tools service. Respect copyrights and platform terms.
Hold an NFC tag to the phone.
This phone does not support NFC.
NFC is off. Enable it in system settings.
Place the phone flat and tap Calibrate.
This device has no accelerometer — bubble level can\'t be used.
Read live from the system broadcast — no permissions required.
This device has no rotation sensor — compass can\'t be used.
Tip: trace a figure-eight in the air to calibrate the magnetometer.
Shopping list, guest WiFi password, address, anything…
QR can hold ~2,900 characters. For longer notes, use Share.
Aim another device at this code — it will read %1$d characters.
Cannot generate QR — text is too long or contains unsupported characters.
This feature will ship in a future update. Stay tuned.
Fill any two values, third is computed.
The tuner needs the microphone to hear your instrument. Audio never leaves your device.
Standard 440 Hz · Orchestral 442 Hz · Baroque 415 Hz
Tip: for multi-color text use markup [#FF0000]red[/] [#00FF00]green[/] etc.
Tap + to add your first smart reminder.
Tap a sticker to paint it the selected colour to mirror your physical cube, or hit Scramble. Then tap Solve and the app will walk you through the moves step by step.
This state is further than 12 moves from solved. The full Kociemba two-phase solver lands in v1.0.0 — for now Scramble + Solve always works.
Cycle through fullscreen colours — surface dead pixels, backlight bleed, and uneven illumination. Tap for the next colour.
Test short pulse, long pulse, and a multi-amplitude waveform.
This phone has no vibration motor.
Sine tone at the selected frequency. Test L/R/both — useful for spotting dead speakers and stereo imaging issues.
Live RMS level meter. Speak normally — should respond smoothly without dropouts.
This device has no flash-capable camera or torch API.
Press the volume keys — the value should change and the last direction should appear below.
The Power button cannot be detected from inside an app (Android intercepts it system-wide). Verify it works by toggling the screen.
This device has no Bluetooth adapter.
Run a scan to find nearby devices (Classic + BLE merged).
No USB devices visible. Connect via OTG cable — flash drive, keyboard, MIDI keyboard, etc.
Apps cannot truly format storage (only Settings → Storage can). This screen recursively deletes EVERYTHING under the picked tree via Storage Access Framework — same filesystem, just empty.
This is IRREVERSIBLE. Every file and folder under the picked root will be permanently deleted. Continue?
Tag (ID3) reader — pick a file and it shows every metadata field plus embedded cover art. Tag editing ships in v1.0.0.
Record yourself and play back at a different pitch. The slider shifts pitch and tempo together (chipmunk effect).
This phone has no IR emitter
Most modern phones (Pixel, OnePlus, Samsung S6+, iPhone) ship without an IR blaster. Network TV control (WoL, Cast, vendor APIs) ships as a separate tool in v0.10.

In CZ / EU recording a call without the other party\'s consent is illegal (GDPR + telecommunications law). Inform the other party and obtain consent before each call. The user is solely responsible for use.
Technical limitation: since Android 10 non-system apps cannot capture call audio (uplink/downlink) directly. We record via the mic while speakerphone is on — enable it in your dialer.
Requires background location permission (Settings → Apps → ZeddiHub → Location → \"Allow all the time\").
Polled every 15 min via Open-Meteo. The same condition won\'t fire again sooner than once per hour.
Broadcasts a BLE manufacturer-data packet that any nearby app can scan. Useful for testing BLE scanners, beacon experiments, or as a pseudo-AirTag.
This device does not support BLE multi-advertise.
